====''[[Pokémon Journeys: The Series]]''====
[[File:Bea anime.png|thumb|250px|Bea in {{aniseries|JN}}]]
Bea made her animated series debut in ''[[JN034|Solitary and Menacing!]]''. She first battled the [[Koichi|Karate Master]] at the [[Fighting Dojo]] in [[Saffron City]] and won. Soon after, she was challenged to a [[World Coronation Series]] battle by {{Ash}} and had a two-on-two battle with him. She used her {{p|Hawlucha}} and {{p|Grapploct}} to battle {{AP|Farfetch'd}} and {{AP|Riolu}} and emerged victorious without losing a single Pokémon, causing her rank to go up.

Bea reappeared in a flashback in ''[[JN036|Making Battles in the Sand!]]''.

Bea reappeared in ''[[JN039|Octo-Gridlock at the Gym!]]'', where she was {{pkmn|training}} at the [[Cianwood Gym]] with [[Chuck]] when she received a challenge to a [[rematch]] from Ash. Bea accepted, using her {{p|Hitmontop}} and Grapploct to battle {{AP|Pikachu}} and Riolu. The battle ended with a draw.

A silhouette of Bea along with her Grapploct was revealed at the end of ''[[JN065|Thrash of the Titans!]]'', revealing that she had advanced to the Ultra Class of the World Coronation Series.

She made a cameo appearance at the end of ''[[JN077|Ultra Exciting from the Shocking Start!]]'' while watching Ash’s World Coronation Series match against [[Volkner]]. During this appearance, she was revealed to possess a [[Dynamax Band]].

In ''[[JN084|An Adventure of Mega Proportions!]]'', Ash was informed that Bea would be his next Ultra Class opponent.

Bea reappeared in ''[[JN085|Battle Three With Bea!]]''. She was shown training with her Pokémon in preparation of her third battle with Ash. After introducing each other to their Pokémon, Ash and Bea enjoyed some sweets with {{an|Korrina}} and [[Goh]]. The next day, the two began their battle, with {{an|Leon}} arriving to spectate and provide commentary. Her battle continued in the [[JN086|next episode]], where she was defeated by Ash's [[Mega Evolution|Mega]] {{AP|Lucario}} despite [[Gigantamax]]ing her {{p|Machamp}}, causing her rank to go down. Later that evening, Bea congratulated Ash on his victory, finally referring to him by his actual name.

Bea reappeared in ''[[JN092|The Winding Path to Greatness!]]'', where she was seen leaving Stow-on-Side Stadium with Machamp as Ash, Goh, and [[Allister]] were arriving to try Gigantamaxing {{AP|Gengar}}. The next day, she returned to the stadium in time to witness Ash successfully Gigantamax Gengar after it had eaten {{DL|Master Dojo|Max Soup}}. Impressed by the sight, Bea remarked to Allister that it was rare for him to be helping others.

In ''[[JN130|Toying With Your Motions!]]'', Bea watched Ash's match against Leon alongside Korrina and [[Gurkinn]].

In ''[[JN136|This Could be the Start of Something Big!]]'', Bea was shown having a training battle against [[Hop]], using Machamp to battle his {{p|Wooloo}} while Leon observed the match.
[[File:Bea sweets.png|thumb|250x250px|Bea's soft spot for sweets]]
